race.comment: HABERFIELD (7) returned last time with a solid third at Warwick over 1350m. This is an easier race so she is likely to play a big role. POWERFUL WARRIOR (3) is an eight-start maiden who finished seventh at his most recent outing over 1350m at Warwick. Likely to be in the finish in this suitable assignment. DREAM SUMMIT (5) returned from a spell a week-and-a-half ago when she was fourth over 1350m at Warwick. Finds an easier assignment and can find winning form. SKIEDA (8) showed good early dash last start and held on well to finish second over 1350m at Warwick. This doesn't look as hard so she is sure to be prominent.
